name: Left Over Turkey Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large saucepan, cook onions and bell peppers in oil until tender.
3. Stir in turkey, corn, enchilada sauce, chili powder, and salt until combined.
4. Spoon about 1/4 of the filling and fat-free cheese onto each tortilla.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly and place seam side down on a baking sheet lined with foil.
6. Sprinkle remaining cheese over the top of the enchiladas.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
